pi_items.source: Verified via Jitsi Meet documentation (https://jitsi.github.io/handbook/docs/faq/) which confirms Jitsi uses baseURL/RoomName format. The meeting room name 'InterpreterSession2024' is a synthetic/custom choice for the task.
Task specification in task.json line 5 requires agent to 'set your name to Maria Interpreter'. This is a synthetic display name chosen for the task.

Verified via official Jitsi blog post (https://jitsi.org/blog/speaker-times-in-jitsi-meet/) which states: 'Just press T while in the meeting and the Speaker Stats panel will come up.' The official UI label is 'Speaker Stats' (not 'Speaker Statistics'). 'Maria Interpreter' is the display name from metadata which matches.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic Jitsi Meet environment running on localhost:8080. The meeting room name 'InterpreterSession2024' and display name 'Maria Interpreter' are arbitrarily chosen for the task and do not represent real data. The expected UI label 'Speaker Stats' is verified as the correct official name for Jitsi Meet's speaker statistics panel (confirmed via official Jitsi blog documentation). The URL format and Jitsi Meet structure are verified as correct.
